sections.heading: Examples
sections.content:
Universe: the totality of all matter and energy that exists in the vastness of space.
Planet: an astronomical object that orbits a star.
Stars: astronomical objects visible as bright points of light.
Orbit: a single revolution of an astronomical object around another.
Cosmonaut: astronaut in the Russian space programme.
Galaxies: groups of billions of stars, planets, gas and dust.
Eclipse: partial or complete hiding of an astronomical object.
Astronaut: someone trained to travel in space.
Gravity: the attraction due to gravitation exerted by Earth or other astronomical objects.
